meta.note: Standardized plot reports. Every identified site follows the same schema; null/missing fields render as em-dashes so gaps are visible, not hidden. Coordinates are [lat, lng]. Financial deal terms are deliberately kept out of this file — it ships to the browser.
template: identity: id, name, municipality, muniCode, status, sources[]
land: grossM2, parcelCount, landClass, features, orientation, elevationM
cadastre: refs[] (rc, label, areaM2) — outlines fetched live from Catastro INSPIRE
planning: instrument, unit, buildableM2, capacity, density, cessions, path, constraints
market: price, pricePerM2, listingUrl — model readout joins from scores.json via muniCode
footprint: fallback polygon if Catastro is unreachable

sites.name: Boalo — BYLD landscape estate

land.landClass: Urbana per Catastro ref format · planning class unverified (check Land classification layer / municipal records)
land.features: Meadow and dehesa giving way to pine and granite outcrops; stone walls; Torre del Parro on the horizon

location.accessNote: 0 km — on the buffer of the P.N. de Guadarrama (protected horizon)

planning.capacity: Branded residences 5,392 m² · hotel 5,286 m² (44 keys) · spa + restaurant 5,110 m² · VPP 3,524 m² · parking 1,762 m²
planning.density: 25% buildable ratio · 75% (52,863 m²) held as dehesa & trails
planning.path: Modular permitting pathway · subject to municipal approval (v0.3, indicative)
planning.constraints: P.N. de Guadarrama buffer edge — protected horizon that cannot be built against

sites.fit: Full BYLD program — landscape hotel + branded residences (Echo / Duo / Grand), operator-run

sites.name: U.E. 18 «Colonia de Santiago» — Colmenarejo

land.landClass: Suelo urbano (execution unit) + rústico edge parcel
land.features: Open field between C. del Pisuerga and the Galapagar boundary dehesa, SE edge of town

location.accessNote: Access at Camino de la Fuente Elvira × Calle del Pisuerga

planning.unit: Unidad de Ejecución U.E. 18 «Colonia de Santiago»
planning.cessions: Internal road network + 3,948 m² green space (Zona 07 grado 1º)
planning.path: Estudio de Detalle + urbanisation project · sistema de compensación, private initiative
planning.constraints: Two zona-verde parcels (1,952.60 + 2,043.27 m²) inside the unit; abuts the Galapagar municipal boundary

sites.fit: Branded-residences-only play (18-home cap, no hotel buildability) — different asset class from Boalo
